categories.label: login
categories.description: user wants to log in, sign in, authenticate, access an existing account, enter the system using email and password, or open a personal dashboard after authentication

categories.label: registration
categories.description: user wants to register, sign up, create a new account, open a new account for first-time use, or open a new account in the system

categories.label: search
categories.description: user wants to search, find, look for, browse, or filter products, services, records, or information

categories.label: payment
categories.description: user wants to pay, make a payment, complete a transaction, or use a card or online method to send money

categories.label: profile
categories.description: user wants to view, edit, or update profile details, account details, or personal information

categories.label: password_reset
categories.description: user wants to reset, recover, or change a forgotten password

categories.label: logout
categories.description: user wants to log out, sign out, or end the current session

categories.label: email_verification
categories.description: user wants to verify, confirm, or activate an account using an email link

categories.label: cart
categories.description: user wants to add items to cart, remove items from cart, or manage a shopping cart

categories.label: order
categories.description: user wants to place an order, confirm an order, track an order, or manage order details

categories.label: booking
categories.description: user wants to book, reserve, or schedule a room, seat, service, or appointment

categories.label: file_upload
categories.description: user wants to upload, attach, submit, import, send, or add a file, document, image, resume, PDF, or attachment to the system

categories.label: notification
categories.description: user wants to receive alerts, reminders, messages, or notifications from the system

categories.label: admin
categories.description: administrator wants to manage users, monitor the system, control settings, or access the admin dashboard

categories.label: checkout
categories.description: user wants to proceed to checkout, complete checkout, or finalize a purchase

categories.label: page_navigation
categories.description: user wants to navigate between pages, open a page, move to a screen, or go from one page to another
